title: Introducing
description: Learn introducing in Filipino Sign Language

pages.title: Welcome to Introducing
pages.content: In this lesson, you'll learn how to sign introducing in Filipino Sign Language (FSL). You'll learn 8 important signs with step-by-step instructions and practice questions.

pages.title: How to Sign 'Address'
pages.content: Learn how to sign 'Address'. Used to communicate or ask about where someone lives or their place of residence.

pages.title: How to Sign 'Age'
pages.content: Learn how to sign 'Age'. Used to communicate or ask about how old someone is.

pages.title: How to Sign 'Birthday'
pages.content: Learn how to sign 'Birthday'. Used to communicate or ask about the date when someone was born.

pages.title: How to Sign 'Birthplace'
pages.content: Learn how to sign 'Birthplace'. Used to communicate or ask about where someone was born.

pages.title: How to Sign 'Family'
pages.content: Learn how to sign 'Family'. Used to communicate or ask about one's family members and relationships.

pages.title: How to Sign 'Filipino'
pages.content: Learn how to sign 'Filipino'. Used to identify or ask if someone is Filipino.

pages.title: How to Sign 'Nation'
pages.content: Learn how to sign 'Nation'. Used to communicate or ask about someone's nationality or country of origin.

pages.title: How to Sign 'Work'
pages.content: Learn how to sign 'Work'. Used to communicate or ask about someone's occupation or profession.

pages.title: Practice: Address
pages.content: Test your understanding with this question.

question.explanation: This sign means 'Address'. Used to communicate or ask about where someone lives or their place of residence.

pages.title: Practice: Birthday
pages.content: Test your understanding with this question.

question.explanation: This sign means 'Birthday'. Used to communicate or ask about the date when someone was born.

pages.title: Practice: Family
pages.content: Test your understanding with this question.

question.explanation: This sign means 'Family'. Used to communicate or ask about one's family members and relationships.

pages.content: Test your understanding with this question.
